column6: description
File missing - migration DB says ported but file does not exist. Original ArrayUtils.java has: contained, append, firstOf, indexOf, lastOf, lastIndexOf, toArray.

CommonMark spec.txt and spec.0.26..0.30.txt are present as test resources but not loaded by any runner — ssg-md has zero CommonMark conformance tests. Only flexmark's internal ast_spec.md is run. Headline gap from docs/architecture/flexmark-port.md Gap Analysis (2026-04-07).
Full AttributesNodeFormatter port pending — TODO at lines 21,36. ext-attributes LOC ratio 0.62 (lowest of all extensions). Markdown→markdown formatting of {#id .class} blocks is a stub.
Full SimTocNodeFormatter port pending — TODO at lines 21,34. SimToc formatter is a stub.

Escaping.normalizeEOL/normalizeEndWithEOL with ReplacedTextMapper throw UnsupportedOperationException (lines 576,581). Replacer simplified to backslash escapes only — Html5Entities-backed numeric/named entity decoding is a stub (lines 79,102,137).
Nested block-quote prefix handling simplified (lines 79-84). Round-trip formatting of nested > quotes loses structure beyond one level.

withMaxRenderTimeMillis is a no-op: renderToObject never wraps in Future/ExecutorService nor checks the limit. Original Template.java enforces it via Future.get(maxRenderTimeMillis). See docs/architecture/liquid-port-gap-analysis.md §4.3.

include_relative broken from disk: Template never tracks sourceLocation nor populates REGISTRY_ROOT_FOLDER. Original Template.java setRootFolderRegistry does this. IncludeRelative cannot resolve. See gap-analysis §4.3.

Missing render API surface: render(jsonString), render(Inspectable), render(key,value,kvs*), errors() accessor, withContextHolder, toStringTree, getParseTree, render(Map,ExecutorService,bool). Port has only render()/render(JMap)/renderToObject(JMap)/renderToObjectUnguarded. See gap-analysis §4.3.
evaluateMode EAGER and LAZY branches are identical (both new LinkedHashMap(variables)). Either implement EAGER via LiquidSupport or remove the enum. See gap-analysis §4.3.
Missing maxTemplateSizeBytes guard. Original Template.java checks this.templateSize > maxTemplateSizeBytes; port doesn't track template size.
Builder._liquidStyleWhere field is read in build() but has NO setter — withLiquidStyleWhere setter missing. Flavor's liquidStyleWhere can never be overridden. Confirmed bug; gap-analysis §4.1.

Builder missing setters present in liqp: withDefaultTimeZone, withEnvironmentMapConfigurator, withSnippetsFolderName, withDateParser, withObjectMapper, withStripSingleLine. Port also lacks defaultTimeZone/environmentMapConfigurator/dateParser fields entirely. See gap-analysis §4.1.
parse() has only String overload. Original liqp ships parse(Path), parse(File), parse(InputStream), parse(Reader), parse(CharStream). Required for streaming large templates from disk.

Self-declared stub (line 14: 'initial stub. Full implementation in Phase 4'). TemplateParser.evaluate silently returns an empty HashMap for any non-LiquidSupport input. Combined with Template.renderToObject not calling evaluate at all, Inspectable POJOs are silently dropped. See gap-analysis §4.18.

Inline 70-line rewrite missing major Jekyll/Liquid Where semantics: no dotted property paths (where: 'address.city' looks up literal key), no POJO support (only JMap+Inspectable), no nil/empty/blank literal handling, no collection-property matching, no numeric coercion of string properties. Original is 5 files (Where.java + filters/where/{Jekyll,Liquid,WhereImpl,PropertyResolverHelper,PropertyResolverAdapter}). See gap-analysis §4.11.

Only parses ISO-8601 inputs. Original ships 63 fallback patterns via filters/date/Parser.java + Ruby ordinal normalization + BasicDateParser.getZonedDateTimeFromTemporalAccessor. Inputs like 'March 1st 2024', '01/15/2024', RFC 2822, '15 Jan' no longer parse. The entire filters/date/* package is skipped. See gap-analysis §4.10.

strftimeToJava missing ~15 directives vs Ruby strftime: %C %D %F %G %g %V %v %N %R %r %s %T %X %U %W %x %c %+ %:z %::z %:::z, plus %0/%_ width/padding modifiers. Port handles only %-X among modifiers.

Hand-rolled serializer regressions vs Jackson: no cycle detection (StackOverflow risk), no TemporalAccessor handling (writes Java toString), doesn't recognize Inspectable, NaN/Infinity emitted as bare tokens (invalid JSON), null map keys quoted as 'null'. See gap-analysis §4.12.

asRubyDate uses ZonedDateTime.from(ta) which throws on partial accessors (LocalDate, LocalTime, Instant) and falls back to ZonedDateTime.now() — silently producing the current time instead of the date. asTemporal also returns now() for non-TA inputs. temporalAsArray only handles ZonedDateTime. isTemporal misses CustomDateFormatRegistry types. See gap-analysis §4.2.
asFormattedNumber diverges for trailing-zero BigDecimals: original strips trailing zeros (5.50 -> 5.5); port appends .0 only if no '.' present (5.50 -> 5.50).
Jekyll branch silently drops non-Map parameters (lines 57-63 have a no-op default case). Original would ClassCastException. Pick one behavior and document; either log a warning or throw.
Missing fields/methods present in liqp: 'template' Template ref, getDateParser() (no BasicDateParser exists in port), getRootFolder() returns Any instead of Path. See gap-analysis §4.4.

Error recovery silently skips unexpected tokens (line 103 '// Skip unexpected token'). Original liqp parser throws LiquidException with line/column info. UX gap for template authors debugging syntax errors.

No rule-by-rule grammar coverage verification. Original LiquidParser.g4 has ~46 productions; not exhaustively mapped to Scala parser methods. At-risk rules: id-as-keyword (allows {% assign if = 1 %}), evaluateInOutputTag predicate, output-rule strict/warn/lax alternatives, error_other_tag 4 recovery branches, not_out_end / other_than_tag_end token sets.

Entire spi/* package skipped (TypesSupport, BasicTypesSupport, Java7DateTypesSupport, Java8DateTypesSupport, SPIHelper). No replacement extension mechanism for custom user types in the port. ServiceLoader doesn't work on JS/Native; design a Scala-3 typeclass replacement (given LiquidTypeSupport[T]) or formally drop SPI from scope and document. See gap-analysis §4.16.
filters/date/* skipped (5 files: BasicDateParser, Parser, FuzzyDateDateParser, CustomDateFormatRegistry, CustomDateFormatSupport). Required to fix Date filter parsing — see related Date.scala bugs.

filters/where/* skipped (5 files: WhereImpl, JekyllWhereImpl, LiquidWhereImpl, PropertyResolverAdapter, PropertyResolverHelper). Required to fix Where filter Jekyll/Liquid mode parity — see related Where.scala bug.

Test coverage ~20-30% of liqp. Port has 280 tests in 12 suites; original has 100+ test files (~1500+ assertions). Missing suites: TemplateSuite (covering render overloads, errors(), max-render-time, max-template-size, ContextHolder), DateFilterSuite, WhereFilterSuite, LValueSuite, LexerSuite, ParserSuite, NodeSuite (14 node test files in original), IncludeRelativeSuite, ProtectionSettings full coverage. See gap-analysis §6.
Default flavor silently changed from LIQP to JEKYLL (TemplateParser.scala:91). Migration footgun for users porting from liqp; document in port doc.

Multi-pass compression loop unimplemented (TODO at Compressor.scala:1021-1033). Single-pass only; TerserSuite compression tests disabled because the loop hangs. Effectively makes TerserJsCompressor a parse+re-emit, not a minifier.

SymbolDef/scope integration missing across compress passes (~50 TODOs in DropUnused, ReduceVars, Inference, Inline, TightenBody, Evaluate, GlobalDefs). Blocks safe inlining, DCE, constant folding, pure-call elision.
sourcemap.js (149 LOC) not ported. OutputStream lacks position tracking. Source map output impossible.
minify.js orchestration stubbed (93 LOC vs 413). Missing ecma normalization, mangle cache, format options, error shape, full pipeline sequencing.
Specialized compression passes missing: collapse-vars, negate-iife, wrap-iife, hoist_vars, drop_console, logical-assignment lowering.
Terser test/compress/*.js (168 fixtures, thousands of cases) not ingested. ssg-js has only 6 munit suites with ~no compression coverage. Fixtures use a simple DSL trivial to parse.
mozilla-ast.js (2099 LOC) SpiderMonkey AST format not ported. Public API surface gap; low priority.
preserveLineBreaks option declared in HtmlMinifyOptions but never read by doMinify(). Dead public API.
HTML quote-stripping over-conservative ([A-Za-z0-9_-]+ only). htmlcompressor strips quotes from any value with no whitespace/=/<>/quotes.
No built-in preserve presets for SSI/JSP/PHP/ASP server tags or CDATA sections.
CSS color folding (rgb()/rgba()->hex, named colors->hex), shorthand collapsing (margin/padding/font-weight), vendor-prefix culling not implemented.
